sentences.arabic: أَحَسَّ فِرَاسٌ بِإِرْهَاقٍ شَدِيدٍ بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ طَوِيلٍ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Firas je osjetio veliki umor nakon dugačke radne sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: Firas felt extreme exhaustion after a long week of work.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَأْخُذَ يَوْمَ رَاحَةٍ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je uzeti dan odmora kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to take a rest day at home.

sentences.translation: Dugo je spavao i pojeo zdrav obrok.
sentences.translationEn: He slept for a long time and ate a healthy meal.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْمَسَاءِ تَمَشَّى فِي الْهَوَاءِ الطَّلْقِ وَشَعَرَ بِتَحَسُّنٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Uveče se prošetao na svježem zraku i osjetio se mnogo bolje.
sentences.translationEn: In the evening he walked in the fresh air and felt much better.
